topStories.description: The clip, taken from the debut episode of Saturday Night Live UK was shared by Trump on his Truth Social platform on Sunday without comment.

topStories.title: Khandre honoured in Bidar after elevation as national president of Veerashaiva Lingayat Mahasabha
topStories.description: Speaking at the function, Siddharoodha Mutt seer Shivakumar Swamiji described Mr. Khandre as a leader shaped by his virtues, combining compassion, courage and commitment to public service

topStories.title: Assam BJP Leader Nandita Garlosa Joins Congress After Not Getting Ticket
topStories.description: Former minister in the Assam government, Nandita Garlosa, has joined the Congress ahead of the assembly election

topStories.title: 'Will never be forgotten...' Iran expresses gratitude as Kashmiris donate gold, cash, copper utensils amid war
topStories.description: Kashmiri residents have launched a donation drive for Iran following recent US-Israel strikes, contributing cash, gold, and other valuables. The Iranian embassy thanked them for their support, while PM Narendra Modi discussed rising Middle East tensions with Iran’s President.

dailyNews.title: Trump mocks Schumer over ‘fund ICE’ gaffe in senate remarks | Watch
dailyNews.description: As the funding impasse continues, Trump is using moments like Schumer’s gaffe to sharpen their messaging. Republicans emphasize national security risks tied to the broader DHS shutdown, while Democrats focus on immediate disruptions affecting travelers and calls for immigration enforcement reforms.

dailyNews.title: Markwayne Mullin moves closer to becoming DHS Secretary after Senate vote, faces final test amid shutdown crisis
dailyNews.description: With the final vote imminent, Mullin’s confirmation would place him at the helm of a deeply divided agency amid ongoing political battles over immigration policy and enforcement authority.

dailyNews.title: Emerging from latest blackout, Cuba says ready for any potential US attack
dailyNews.description: Trump, who cut off oil supplies to Cuba after abducting Venezuela's Maduro, has threatened to take over the nation.

dailyNews.title: Trump sends US immigration agents to airports as shutdown chaos deepens
dailyNews.description: Shutdown standoff forces US President Trump's hand as airport queues spiral and security staff go unpaid.

dailyNews.title: Iran warns of ‘complete closure’ of Strait of Hormuz if US targets its power plants
dailyNews.description: The warning follows a direct threat from Donald Trump, who said the US would strike Iran’s power infrastructure if the Strait is not reopened.

dailyNews.title: No end to Iran war soon? Team Trump says US has plenty of money to fund it
dailyNews.description: No end to Iran war soon Team Trump says US has plenty of money to fund it

dailyNews.title: Karnataka bypolls: Fear of rebellion looms large over Congress in Davangere
dailyNews.description: Though KPCC president and Deputy Chief Minister D.K. Shivakumar claimed in Bengaluru that candidates’ selection for the Assembly bypoll was based on consensus and the decision was unanimous, a Congress leader and disappointed ticket aspirant for Davangere South constituency Mohammad Sadiq Pehelwan announced in Davangere that he would challenge Congress candidate Samarth as a rebel candidate

dailyNews.title: Trinamool Congress Announces 23 Candidates For Assam Polls
dailyNews.description: The Trinamool is focusing on contests on selective seats, strategic withdrawals, and consolidation of opposition votes to counter the BJP in Assam.

dailyNews.title: Trump says ICE agents will assist airport security as DHS shutdown continues
dailyNews.description: Travellers have faced hours-long waits at airports around the country as a partial government shutdown has left TSA agents without pay.

dailyNews.title: Assembly Elections highlights: Congress releases final list of 7 candidates for Assam Assembly polls
dailyNews.description: The Congress and DMK broadly agreed to share 15 seats each in the 30-member Puducherry Assembly, which goes to polls on April 9

dailyNews.title: Vijay announces TVK candidates for all 30 Assembly segments in Puducherry
dailyNews.description: TVK president Vijay preparing to contest solo on April 9

dailyNews.title: IIT graduate leaves lucrative US job to travel the world, says ‘living life king-size’
dailyNews.description: A major turning point came during his visit to Montenegro, where he met Kathy, an Austrian social worker. What started as a brief conversation soon turned into something deeper.

dailyNews.title: Ukraine’s Zelenskyy urges allies to pressure Russia ahead of US talks
dailyNews.description: With US-Ukraine talks set to resume in Florida, Volodymyr Zelenskyy warns Russia is increasing its oil revenues.

dailyNews.title: US rejects Iran’s claim of targeting F-15 jet near Hormuz island, calls report false
dailyNews.description: With no independent confirmation of Iran’s latest claim and the US firmly denying any loss of aircraft, the situation remains unclear as tensions continue to escalate in the region.

dailyNews.title: ‘Our military is prepared’: Havana's stern warning to US amid Trump's threats of potential takeover of Cuba
dailyNews.description: Cuba's deputy foreign minister warned the US that the island's military is ready to respond to any aggression as the Trump administration pushes for regime change. He stated that the military is currently preparing for ‘possibility of military aggression’.

dailyNews.title: US, Iran Trade Threats To "Destroy" Middle East Infrastructure
dailyNews.description: The tit-for-tat threats came as the war entered its fourth week and continued to reverberate across the Middle East, with alarm mounting over strikes around nuclear sites.

dailyNews.title: ‘We do it together, in confidence’: Netanyahu backs US strikes on Iran
dailyNews.description: Benjamin Netanyahu has vowed to back US strikes on Iran’s power grid if Tehran does not reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: BJP defeat must to save Assam: citizens’ collective
dailyNews.description: The Assam Nagorik Sanmilani, which urged Raijor Dal on to join the Congress-led bloc a few days ago, says the BJP’s divisive politics have hollowed out the Assamese identity

dailyNews.title: National blackout hits Cuba for second time in a week
dailyNews.description: Another total failure of its power grid underlines Cuba's hardship under a US-imposed fuel blockade.

dailyNews.title: Ex-CIA chief blames Trump for Iran war, says US stuck with no way out
dailyNews.description: ExCIA chief blames Trump for Iran war says US stuck with no way out

dailyNews.title: Middle East conflict: Scott Bessent defends US strikes on Iran, says ‘you have to escalate to de-escalate’
dailyNews.description: Amid the ongoing conflict in the Middle East, US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent defended the US strikes on Iran. His remarks came a day after President Donald Trump threatened to obliterate power plants in Iran, if it fails to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Cuban official reveals military 'preparing' for conflict after Trump considers 'taking' island
dailyNews.description: Cuba's deputy foreign minister says the island is preparing for 'possible military aggression' amid Trump's remarks about 'taking' the nation in some form.

dailyNews.title: Iran chokes Strait of Hormuz with reported $2M tanker toll, regime threatens global oil supply
dailyNews.description: Strait of Hormuz traffic is near collapse as Iran reportedly charges tankers $2 million in transit fees, prompting President Trump to threaten strikes on Iranian power infrastructure.

dailyNews.title: Carlos Fernández de Cossío: Cuba 'preparing' for 'possibility of military aggression'
dailyNews.description: Cuba's deputy foreign minister says the military is preparing for possible U.S. aggression after Trump said it would be an "honor" to take Cuba.

dailyNews.title: Waltz says Trump is using Iran's own oil strategy against itself to drive down global prices
dailyNews.description: The U.S. lifts sanctions on 140 million barrels of Iranian oil at sea, while keeping bank sanctions in place to deny Tehran the revenue.

dailyNews.title: Schumer knocks Trump on Iran, plan to send ICE to airports: 'Asking for trouble'
dailyNews.description: Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer called President Donald Trump's plan to deploy ICE agents to U.S. airports "impulsive" on Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Newsom's claim Texas and Florida are the 'real high tax states' picked apart by expert: 'Fatally flawed'
dailyNews.description: Just Facts President James Agresti told Fox News Digital that Gov. Gavin Newsom's claims that California is more tax-friendly than Texas and Florida simply don't add up.

dailyNews.title: Israel Thought It Could Spur Rebellion Inside Iran. That Hasn’t Happened.
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s hopes that an Israeli plan to ignite an internal uprising against Iran’s theocratic government could bring the war to a swift end have so far been dashed.

dailyNews.title: ICE to Help TSA at Airports Amid Partial Shutdown, Trump’s Border Czar Says
dailyNews.description: Tom Homan, President Trump’s chief border official, cast the operation largely as one to help ease long security lines that have been frustrating passengers at U.S. airports.

dailyNews.title: Mullin Explored Bipartisan Deal to Rein in Immigration Crackdown
dailyNews.description: The G.O.P. senator President Trump chose to lead the Department of Homeland Security privately discussed concessions the White House has repeatedly rejected.
